priority_rule: lowest numeric priority first; operator reconciliation > paper ledger rerun > paper/shadow evidence > external live evidence > sealed baseline > scale-up policy
conflict_resolution_rule: safety > no-trade > operator reconciliation > ledger rerun > paper/shadow evidence > external live evidence > sealed baseline > scale-up; never close gaps by inference
